zh.Oldenburg, Lower Saxony Germany: 德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg於1125年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格時，他的父親Elimar II Count of Oldenburg55歲，母親Eilika von Werl-Riedberg22歲。他於大約1166年與Salome von Geldern-Zutphen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1167年6月6日在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格維爾德沙奧森享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg于1125年出生在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格时，他的父亲Elimar II Count of Oldenburg55岁，母亲Eilika von Werl-Riedberg22岁。他于大约1166年与Salome von Geldern-Zutphen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1167年6月6日在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格維爾德沙奧森享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg was born in 1125, in Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Elimar II Count of Oldenburg, was 55 and his mother, Eilika von Werl-Riedberg, was 22. He married Salome von Geldern-Zutphen about 1166. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 June 1167, in Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg est né en 1125, à Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Elimar II Count of Oldenburg, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Eilika von Werl-Riedberg, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Salome von Geldern-Zutphen environ 1166. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1167, à Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg 1125 in Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Elimar II Count of Oldenburg 55 und seine Mutter Eilika von Werl-Riedberg 22. Er hat um 1166 Salome von Geldern-Zutphen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Juni 1167 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg è nato il nel 1125 nel Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Elimar II Count of Oldenburg, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Eilika von Werl-Riedberg, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Salome von Geldern-Zutphen circa 1166. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 giugno 1167, nel Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Oldenburg, Lower Saxony Germany: ドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オルデンブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburgが1125年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オルデンブルグで生まれた時，父Elimar II Count of Oldenburgは55歳，母Eilika von Werl-Riedbergは22歳であった。約1166年にSalome von Geldern-Zutphenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1167年6月6日にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オルデンブルグウィルデシャウセンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg(이)가 1125년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Elimar II Count of Oldenburg(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Eilika von Werl-Riedberg(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1166년 Salome von Geldern-Zutphen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1167년 6월 6일 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 덴버그 윌데쇼센에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg nasceu em 1125, em Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Elimar II Count of Oldenburg, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Eilika von Werl-Riedberg, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Salome von Geldern-Zutphen aproximadamente 1166. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1167, em Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg родился в 1125 г. в местности ландкрис олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Elimar II Count of Oldenburg было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Eilika von Werl-Riedberg, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Salome von Geldern-Zutphen около 1166 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 июня 1167 г. в местности уаилдешаусен, ландкрис олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg nació en 1125, en Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Elimar II Count of Oldenburg, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Eilika von Werl-Riedberg, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Salome von Geldern-Zutphen aproximadamente 1166. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de junio de 1167, en Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 42 años.
